Author: AemiliusXIV
Name: ChronoLog
Punchline: OBS chapter markers and YouTube timestamps for every raid pull. Use /chrono.
Description:
Tracks pulls, wipes and clears in any duty. Per pull: fight name, phase, boss HP%, first death, duration.

Outputs OBS chapter markers via websocket and a paste-ready YouTube description block. A direct API push to a live stream's description is planned for a later release.

Short resets are filtered out automatically. /chrono to open, /chrono cfg for settings.
Changelog: UX fixes: plugin reloads and updates no longer show a spurious OBS disconnection message. The 'Copy new' button now tracks state per session, so switching sessions mid-prog no longer breaks the copy cursor on other sessions. Phase timestamps toggle is locked during an active session. Template preview in settings shows a real pull when one is available. Added 'Ask before clearing a session' to Capture settings. Phase offset range extended to allow small positive values. Hotkey fallback field now has a tooltip.
